review_reason: Implementation blocked: timelineQuot_not_valid_of_neg_consistent requires truth lemma infrastructure over TimelineQuot that doesn't exist. The plan assumed FMCS/BFMCS could be built over TimelineQuot easily, but the box case of the truth lemma requires full BFMCS bundle construction with modal saturation. Four options identified in summary - user decision needed.

partial_progress.details: Analyzed existing infrastructure. Determined that direct truth lemma approach requires substantial new BFMCS infrastructure. The CanonicalMCS-based truth lemma uses D=Int hardcoded; TimelineQuot needs its own infrastructure.

errors.message: Direct truth lemma approach blocked by missing BFMCS infrastructure for TimelineQuot. TypeClass resolution issues with artificial AddCommGroup. Box case requires modal saturation not available in single-family FMCS.
errors.recommendation: Consider Option B (Transfer Theorem) or Option D (restructure to use CanonicalMCS directly)

completion_data.completion_summary: Task 982 Phase 1 blocked. Analyzed TimelineQuot truth lemma requirements. Existing CanonicalMCS/Int infrastructure doesn't bridge to TimelineQuot-based validity. Four resolution options documented for user decision.
